name: outlook-email-summarize
description: Read Outlook email safely through a minimal, read-only MCP server optimized for summarization.

interface.shortDescription: Read and summarize Outlook inbox mail
interface.longDescription: A read-first Outlook bundle for OpenClaw. Uses Microsoft Graph with device code auth by default and only exposes safe inbox-reading tools unless you explicitly opt into unsafe mode.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the latest Outlook emails and flag what needs a reply
